Class ReorderView.ReorderSummaryRow

java.lang.Object
com.project.view.manager.ReorderView.ReorderSummaryRow
Enclosing class:
ReorderView
public static class ReorderView.ReorderSummaryRow extends Object
Represents a row in the reorder summary table.

Each row contains the item name, the quantity to reorder, and the total cost associated with that item.

    • ReorderSummaryRow

      public ReorderSummaryRow(String itemName, int reorderQty, double cost)
      Creates a new reorder summary row.
      Parameters:
      itemName - the name of the inventory item
      reorderQty - the quantity to reorder
      cost - the total cost of the reorder item
